genpca: Vignette Guide

genpca.Rmd

This is a short map of the genpca documentation. Each vignette is small and focused; pick the one you need.

Basics

vignette("gpca-basics", package = "genpca") covers a quick start, identity vs diagonal metrics, choosing ncomp, and a tiny real-data example (USArrests).

Metrics

vignette("gpca-metrics", package = "genpca") shows how to build practical row/column metrics (AR(1), spatial kernels, graph Laplacians, heteroscedastic weights), how gpca_mle() can learn metrics, and what to watch for with SPD remedies.

Scale & Special Cases

vignette("gpca-scale", package = "genpca") gives backend choices (eigen, spectra, deflation), sparse workflows, the covariance-only route (genpca_cov), out-of-sample projection tips, and performance notes.

PLS

For generalized PLS/CCA, see vignette("gplssvd-reference", package = "genpca") for the mathematical reference and a quick-start code chunk.

On this page

Developed by Brad Buchsbaum.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
